notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Edwin Arroyo out at 2nd. JJ Bleday out at 1st.
